titleStmt.title: SII 28.137: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 137. (A.R. No. 292 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, First prākāra, north wall.

This record is connected with No. 134) above. However, whereas the latter was an order issued under authority by a Toṇḍaimāṉ (for his full name reference may be made to that record), the present one was issued by Villavarāyaṉ.

It refers to the land, 3 mā is extent, in Paṉmahēśvara-nallūr, a hamlet (piḍāgai) of Irāja-sūriya-chcharuppēdimaṅgalam which was other than that was endowed for the garden (tirunandavaṉam) already (by the same individual i.e., Vēḷāṉ Paṭṭāladēvaṉ alias Chētirāyaṉ) the kiḻāṉ of Koṭṭūr in Pūṅguṉṟam) and 400 kuḻi of land in Irājarājanallūr, a piḍāgai of Irājavichchādirapuram, a dēvadānam in Irājādhirāja-vaḷanāḍu, constituting the Paṭṭāladēvan-tirunandavanam. It is stated that what is paid of due from those lands as per the temple-register (dēvadānam-oṭṭu-paḍiyāl uḷḷa) will be paid as maintenance of the several persons engaged to fulfil the wants (pala-paṇi-nimandakkāṟar) (of the temple) and the balance (after paying) the above (i.e.,) iṟai-migudi) will be uḍal (capital, amount for the persons tending (tiruttuṇḍargaḷ) (the garden).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ— villavarāyaṉ Olai koyil kūṟu teṉṉavaṉ brahmārāyarum vikramacoḻabrahmarāyarum jayatuṅkap pallavaraiyarum kurukulattaraiyarum Uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyār koyil śrīmāheśvarakkaṇ
kāṇi ceyvārkaḷum śrīkāriyañ ceyvārkaḷum sāmutāyañ ceyvārkaḷum koyil nāyakañ ceyvārkaḷum tirumāḷikaikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷum tirukkaioṭṭip paṇṭārattārum kaṇakkarum kaṇṭu viṭuta
ntatāvatu Irājādhirāja vaḷanaāṭṭut tevatāṉam Irājaviccātirapurattup piṭākai Irācarācanallūril pūṅkuṉṟattuk koṭṭurkiḻāṉ veḷāṉpaṭṭāla tevaṉāṉa cetarāyaṉ ceyvitta paṭṭālatevaṉ tirunantavaṉattu
kku Ivūril tirunantavaṉattaṟaiyākak koṇṭuviṭṭa kuḻi nānūṟum Ittiruṉantavaṉattu tiruṉantavaṉañ ceykiṟa tiruttoṇṭarkaḷukku koṟṟukku Uṭalāka koṇṭuviṭṭa Irācacūriyaccaruppeti maṅka
lattup piṭākai paṉmāheśvaranallūril Ittiruṉantavaṉattukku muṉpu koṇṭu viṭṭuk kalveṭṭiṉa nilam nikki vaṅkiṟapuṟattu Āḷuṭaiyāṉ paṭṭaṉum māṭapocaṉ tiruveṇkāṭu paṭṭaṉum pakkal
vilaikoṇṭa karuṇākaravatikkuk kiḻakku kaṇṭarātittaṉ vāykkālukku vaṭakku mutaṟ kaṇṇāṟṟu nālāñ catirattu nilam Āṟumā Itil vaṭakkaṭaya pañcavaṉmātevi Ūrppaṟṟu nilam muṉṟu mā nikki teṟ
kaṭaiya nilam Iraṇṭumā nikki Itaṉ vaṭakku Erikaraiyum tiṭarum paṉṉavāyum Uṭpaṭa nilam Orumāvum Oṉpatāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu nālāñ catirattu kurovi Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷapaṭṭaṉ viṟṟa nilattukku teṟka
ṭaiya nilam Iraṇṭumāvum Āka nilam muṉṟu māvākum tirunantavaṉaṅ kuḻi nānūṟṟukkum tirukkaioṭṭi paṇṭāratte cātaṉam Oṭukkuvittukkoṇṭu Ittevatāṉam Oṭṭup paṭiyāl Uḷḷa ne
llu Itaṉ Etirāṇṭu mutal palapaṇi nimantakkāraṟkku jivitam Aṭaittuk kaiolai Eḻutiṉapaṭiye Iṟukkavum Iṟai mikitiyāl Uḷḷatu tiruttoṇṭarka(ḷa)ḷukku Uṭalākak koṇṭu tirunantavaṉañ cey
yavum Ippaṭikku tirumāḷikaiyile kalveṭṭavum paṇṇuvate Ippaṭi ceyyapaṇṇuvate Ivai villavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu ḥ—
Digital edition of SII 28.137 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
